title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 October 2021

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 October 2021
summary:
Main
The sharp volatility in Iron ore and steel prices has revealed the influence of China on the global commodity markets
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2021-10-02_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-01-october-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report-1_96d694d812df.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2021-10-02_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-01-october-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report-1_96d694d812df.pdf

[Page 1]
WEEKLY
hekllenic
SHIP
RECYCLING
REPORT
24 th September to 1st October 2021
Highlights of the Week
T he sharp volatility in Iron ore and steel prices has revealed the influence of
jhhnhu
Chi na on the global commodity markets. The sentiments of recyclers have
been highly affected with these steep movements, but one should not
overlook the fact that the prevailing prices in the subcontinent market are
substantially higher in comparison to the prices before this unexpected
sharp rise which made them cross the USD 600 mark and the owners are
still getting a great value for their aging assets. Currently very few deals are
being finalized due to weak sentiments, but the tonnage supply has
relatively improved than the previous week.
